title: Sensor Setup
description: How to pair your Plantgotchi sensor via Bluetooth, configure WiFi, and understand LED indicators.

sections.body: Setting up a Plantgotchi sensor takes about 2 minutes. Here's the full walkthrough.

sections.heading: Bluetooth Pairing
sections.body:
All Plantgotchi sensors communicate over Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE). The sensor advertises a custom GATT service with UUID 0000FE00-0000-1000-8000-00805F9B34FB.

  1. Power on your sensor (insert battery or press the button).
  2. Open the Plantgotchi app and go to the sensor scan screen.
  3. The app scans for devices advertising the Plantgotchi service UUID.
  4. Tap your sensor when it appears in the list.
  5. The app connects and reads the four data characteristics: moisture, temperature, light, and battery.

sections.heading: BLE Data Characteristics
sections.body:
Each sensor exposes these BLE characteristics (all support Read and Notify):

MetricUUID suffixFormatUnit
MoistureFE01uint16, little-endian0–100%
TemperatureFE02int16, little-endian°C × 100
LightFE03uint32, little-endianlux
BatteryFE04uint80–100%

Temperature is sent as an integer multiplied by 100 (e.g., 2350 = 23.50°C) to avoid floating-point issues over BLE. The app divides by 100 automatically.

sections.heading: WiFi Configuration (Solo / PlantCam / Pro)
sections.body:
Sensors with WiFi capability can connect directly to your network:

  1. After BLE pairing, the app writes WiFi credentials to the Config characteristic (FE05).
  2. The sensor connects to your WiFi network and begins uploading readings directly to Turso.
  3. BLE remains active as a fallback if WiFi drops.

sections.heading: LED Indicators
sections.body:
• Solid green — Connected and transmitting normally
  • Blinking blue — BLE advertising, waiting for connection
  • Blinking yellow — Connecting to WiFi
  • Red flash — Battery critically low (below 5%)

sections.heading: Notification Interval
sections.body: By default, sensors send new readings every 30–60 seconds over BLE Notify. You can adjust this interval via the Config characteristic to balance between data freshness and battery life.
